title: VOS: First Faiths
description:
Welcome to Veil Obscura Services.

The VOS Software Rehabilitation Division has a new file for you to process: First Faiths.

WARNING: The terrain is unstable. Death is not an end; it is a necessary data point for your progress. Analyze threats, understand the software's mechanics, and report your findings.

Key Features of FirstFaiths.exe:

■ Learning Through Agony: In a world where death is just data, every failure is a lesson. Analyze your mistakes, adapt your strategy, and unravel the mysteries of the temple, run after run.

■ Glyph-Based Ritual Combat: Defend your soul by drawing protective sigils in real-time. The precision and speed of your strokes will determine the outcome of your encounters with the entities.

■ The Butterfly Effect at the heart of the sanctuary: Your choices are never trivial. Each decision alters the protagonists' paths, leading to unpredictable narrative branches.

■ Tactical Management & Survival: Gear up using the VOS shop system. Manage your resources sparingly to survive your exploration.

■ Mapping & Investigation: Use your maps and notes to stave off madness. In this claustrophobic labyrinth, knowledge is your only weapon against the unknown.

■ A Descent into Dread: Immerse yourself in an oppressive audiovisual atmosphere, where every shadow is designed to push your psychological limits.

■ Multiple Fates: Your actions will define your reality. Unlock numerous possible endings and discover what truly lies behind the operations of Veil Obscura Services.

The protocol is simple: no agent returns unscathed, but they all provide data. Will you be the one to finally shed light on First Faiths?

■ The Official Soundtrack is included completely free with your purchase of the game ! ■
description_short: As an agent deployed by Veil Obscura Services, your mission is simple: progress, perish, repeat. In this claustrophobic point-and-click horror experience, every corridor, every artifact, and every sound could be your last. Are you prepared to honor your contract?
